response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and diverse technical experience, they are fundamentally misaligned with this role. They lack native-level Japanese language proficiency (a hard requirement), have no embedded firmware or networking security background, no Linux kernel development experience, and their career has focused on web/mobile/high-level systems rather than embedded C for network devices. The role requires deep specialization in network security, embedded systems, and low-level protocols—none of which appear in their background.
strengths: 15+ years of proven software engineering across multiple domains with strong TDD and code quality practices
Demonstrated ability to learn diverse programming languages and rapidly develop expertise in new areas
Some embedded systems experience through robotic arm development and hardware tooling infrastructure work
concerns: Complete absence of native-level Japanese language proficiency, which is explicitly required for the role
No background in embedded firmware development, network security, or switch/networking product engineering
No evidence of Linux kernel analysis, source-code modification, or low-level systems programming experience

key_factors.factor: C programming and Linux kernel experience
